rulings.Case Title: ROSE OKELLO VS. INDYMAC MBS, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, Sept. 28, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT IMPAC FUNDING CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend, plaintiff failed to make proposed amendments of the original complaint in this amended complaint: The opposition to this motion is the same boiler plate as opposition to the demurrer to the original complaint. =(501/REQ)
